violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets on walk-in and refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Inspector observed several floor tiles damages or missing in the kitchen. PIC stated repair is scheduled this evening. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guuidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

A shaker cup was observed in the hand-washing sink at the main bar; cleaning products and dishes were observed in the sinks at the rear bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed shaker cup; rear bar was not in operation at the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The hand washing sink at the rear bar is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

Meat sauce, which was previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Staff reheated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Cheese was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit above the fill-line in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling PIC moved excess cheese to other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Bacon jam was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Inspector observed hotel pans filled on the counter filled with ice used for cold holding. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC provided a sheet pan for storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the reach-in refrigerator and walk-in were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. PIC ordered test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The outside dumpster is not closed/covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC closed dumpster. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The walk-in was not in good repair, observed with an ambient of 47 degrees. PIC called for service, all foods requiring refrigeration were moved to other units. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Inspector observed several floor tiles cracked or missing in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). PIC adjusted machine to proper concentration; service was also contacted during inspection. Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service was contacted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -gaskets to the walk-in and reach-in refrigerator -shelving of the reach-in refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The following have an accumulation of dust and debris: -walk-in fan guards -ansul pipes under the hood. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Several floor tiles in the kitchen were observed cracked or missing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
